title: arctostaphylos pastillosa
intro: Arctostaphylos pastillosa, also known as Pastillo Manzanita, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family that is native to Mexico. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos pastillosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to make herbal remedies for various health issues.
